name: TECHPACK
short_description: A brand new arcade game collection from the not-so-80's
detailed_description:
TECHPACK Collection is a compilation of games styled after the golden age of arcades! Each game being tailored to the very specific hardware they would have run on, with hardware limitations and all!

Features planned for the future:

Mutliple games:

Play many diffrent games with many diffrent playstyles, go for a highscore or even go on an adventure

Learn about the history of the games and worlds:

Read and find fake game flyers, tounge-in-cheek writings about the history of these games (and how they failed), uncover concept art and unused assets, and more!

DIP Switches, Game Customisation and Game Ports:

Mess with the DIP Pins found on arcade boards to change the rules to your liking. Look forward to upcoming plans of workshop supported texture packs, and play amusing fake "ports" of the arcade games, refrencing home console ports of real arcades

...And so much more!
